rationale: Re-instantiate every trigger-protected forall ensures separately for post1_self_ and post2_self_ to ground both sides in the e-graph, chain the stable struct fields cross-run via pre_self_ with `=~=`, and add bridge `forall` assertions carrying both-side triggers for pcid_active / ioid_active / pcid_to_proc_ptr / ioid_to_proc_ptr / get_pagetable_mapping_by_pcid, plus a case-split on `p == target_ioid` for get_iommu_table_mapping_by_ioid. This closes the trigger gap so z3 can discharge det_iommu_table_map_4k_page_equal without any quantifier match between the two duplicated ensures.
